'''Katie Grawley''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] settler of [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]. She was the daughter of [[Grif Grawley|Grif]] and [[Carole Grawley|Carole]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], she was killed in an Imperial [[Sulon massacre|attack]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' {{1stm}}
